title: Pinned: We’re excited to unveil the name of our new London building: Platform 37. 📍 The name honors both the surrounding area’s transport heritage and "Move 37" – the critical moment where our AI system AlphaGo showed it could find novel solutions humans hadn't considered.

content.summary: We’re excited to unveil the name of our new London building: Platform 37. 📍 The name honors both the surrounding area’s transport heritage and "Move 37" – the critical moment where our AI system AlphaGo showed it could find novel solutions humans hadn't considered. Video
